query: Get the UNSPSC classification code (all 8 levels: segment, family, class, commodity), NAICS code, and ISIC code for the company named "Velocity IT". The company's official website domain is velocityit.net — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Return accurate UNSPSC with segmentCode, segmentCategory, familyCode, familyCategory, classCode, classCategory, commodityCode, and commodityCategory.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Velocity IT (velocityit.net) is a Managed Service Provider (MSP) and IT consulting firm based in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex and Columbus, Ohio. Based on its core operations of providing 24/7 managed IT services, cybersecurity, and cloud integration, the company is best classified under **NAICS code 541513** (Computer Facilities Management Services), **ISIC Rev. 4 code 6203** (Computer facilities management activities), and **UNSPSC Commodity Code 81111800** (System and system component administration services). 

---

### Company Operational Profile
To accurately map Velocity IT to global classification standards, it is necessary to define its core business activities. Founded in 2010, Velocity IT operates primarily as a Managed Service Provider (MSP) [Home - Velocity IT | Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/). 
*   **Core Services:** The company provides 24/7/365 network monitoring, proactive IT support, cybersecurity (threat detection and incident response), and data backup/disaster recovery [Home - Velocity IT | Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/), [Cybersecurity Company Dallas | Services](https://www.velocityit.net/cybersecurity-services/), [IT Solutions Company Columbus Ohio | Velocity IT](https://velocityits.com/about-it-solutions/).
*   **Secondary Services:** Velocity IT offers cloud migration (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365), hosted VoIP business telephone services, and structured cabling for voice, data, and fiber optics [Home - Velocity IT | Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/), [Home - Velocity IT | Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/business-telephone-services/), [Structured Cabling in Dallas - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/structured-cabling-in-dallas/).

### UNSPSC Classification
The United Nations Standard Products and Services Code (UNSPSC) categorizes IT services under Segment 81 [UNSPSC Codes: Segments, Families & Full Classification Hierarchy](https://wisepim.com/guides/product-taxonomy/unspsc). Because Velocity IT provides managed IT and system administration, it falls under the "System and system component administration services" class [UNSPSC Codes Class: 81111800 - UNSPSC Codes | United States Datasets](https://usa.databasesets.com/unspsc/class/81111800). 

When a specific 8-digit Commodity code is not available in the directory, standard UNSPSC methodology dictates completing the hierarchy by using "00" for the missing levels [UNDERSTANDING UNSPSC](https://www.in.gov/idoa/procurement/files/unspsc1.pdf). 

The exact 8-level UNSPSC hierarchy for Velocity IT is:
*   **segmentCode:** 81
*   **segmentCategory:** Engineering and Research and Technology Based Services [UNSPSC Codes Class: 81111500 - UNSPSC Codes | United States Datasets](https://usa.databasesets.com/unspsc/class/81111500)
*   **familyCode:** 81110000
*   **familyCategory:** Computer services [UNSPSC Codes Family: 81110000 - UNSPSC Codes | United States Datasets](https://usa.databasesets.com/unspsc/family/81110000)
*   **classCode:** 81111800
*   **classCategory:** System and system component administration services [UNSPSC Codes Class: 81111800 - UNSPSC Codes | United States Datasets](https://usa.databasesets.com/unspsc/class/81111800)
*   **commodityCode:** 81111800
*   **commodityCategory:** System and system component administration services [UNDERSTANDING UNSPSC](https://www.in.gov/idoa/procurement/files/unspsc1.pdf)

### NAICS Classification
Business directories broadly list Velocity IT under NAICS codes 54 and 541 (Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services) [Velocity IT - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/velocity-it/437356048). However, a precise 6-digit mapping of their specific services yields two primary codes commonly used by Managed Service Providers [r/msp on Reddit: Which NAICS code do you use?](https://www.reddit.com/r/msp/comments/nu3onu/which_naics_code_do_you_use/):

*   **Primary Code - NAICS 541513 (Computer Facilities Management Services):** This is the most accurate classification for Velocity IT's core MSP business. It specifically covers establishments engaged in providing on-site management and operation of clients' computer systems, ongoing IT infrastructure management, security monitoring, and threat detection [NAICS Code 541513 - Computer Facilities Management Services | IBISWorld](https://www.ibisworld.com/classifications/naics/541513/computer-facilities-management-services/), [NAICS Code for Cybersecurity: Everything You Need to Know - Tolu Michael](https://tolumichael.com/naics-code-for-cybersecurity/), [SamSearch - NAICS 541513 - Computer Facilities Management Services](https://samsearch.co/naics-ai-lookup/541513).
*   **Secondary Code - NAICS 541512 (Computer Systems Design Services):** Because Velocity IT also provides cloud migration, Microsoft 365 integration, and secure system design, they also qualify for this code, which covers IT consulting and systems integration design [NAICS Code 541512 - Computer Systems Design Services | IBISWorld](https://www.ibisworld.com/classifications/naics/541512/computer-systems-design-services/), [NAICS Code for Cybersecurity: Everything You Need to Know - Tolu Michael](https://tolumichael.com/naics-code-for-cybersecurity/).

### ISIC Classification
Under the International Standard Industrial Classification (ISIC) Revision 4, Velocity IT's operations fall under Section J (Information and communication) [International Standard Industrial Classification - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_Standard_Industrial_Classification). The most accurate codes for their service portfolio are:

*   **Primary Code - ISIC Rev. 4 Code 6203 (Computer facilities management activities):** This code is designated for the on-site management and operation of clients' computer systems and data processing facilities, directly aligning with Velocity IT's managed network monitoring and IT support [How to choose a SIC code for your software agency](https://www.legislate.ai/blog/how-to-choose-a-sic-code-for-your-software-development-agency).
*   **Secondary Code - ISIC Rev. 4 Code 6202 (Computer consultancy and computer facilities management activities):** This covers the planning and designing of computer systems that integrate hardware, software, and communication technologies [ISIC Codes for information-technology](https://siccode.com/search-isic/information-technology), [ISIC v4.0 Code 6209: Other information technology and computer service activities - 121 Export](https://www.121-export.com/classifications/isic/v4/J/6209).
*   **Tertiary Code - ISIC Rev. 4 Code 6209 (Other information technology and computer related activities not elsewhere classified):** This code encompasses specific secondary services offered by Velocity IT, including computer disaster recovery, software installation, and IT infrastructure optimization [ISIC v4.0 Code 6209: Other information technology and computer service activities - 121 Export](https://www.121-export.com/classifications/isic/v4/J/6209).

---

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Direct Directory Listings:** While broad 2-digit and 3-digit NAICS codes (54, 541) were found in direct corporate directory listings for Velocity IT, the precise 6-digit NAICS, ISIC, and UNSPSC codes had to be mapped analytically based on the company's explicitly stated services (MSP, system administration, cybersecurity). 
*   **UNSPSC Commodity Code:** A distinct 8-digit commodity code specifically named for "Managed IT Services" was not present in the findings; therefore, the standard UNSPSC protocol of appending "00" to the 6-digit Class code (81111800) was utilized to complete the 8-level hierarchy.
